ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the production */,
  "mtu" TEXT /* Time period of the production data (UTC) */,
  "biomass_actual" REAL /* Biomass actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "fossil_brown_coal" REAL /* Fossil brown coal/lignite actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "fossil_coal_gas" REAL /* Fossil coal-derived gas actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "fossil_gas" REAL /* Fossil gas actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "fossil_hard_coal" REAL /* Fossil hard coal actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "fossil_oil" REAL /* Fossil oil actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "fossil_oil_shale" REAL /* Fossil oil shale actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "fossil_peat" REAL /* Fossil peat actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "geothermal_actual" REAL /* Geothermal actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "hydro_pumped_storage_actual_aggregated" REAL /* Hydro pumped storage actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "hydro_pumped_storage_consumption" REAL /* Hydro pumped storage consumption in MW */,
  "hydro_run_of_river" REAL /* Hydro run-of-river and poundage actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "hydro_water_reservoir" REAL /* Hydro water reservoir actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "marine_actual" REAL /* Marine actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "nuclear_actual" REAL /* Nuclear actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "other_actual" REAL /* Other actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "other_renewable_actual" REAL /* Other renewable actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "solar_actual" REAL /* Solar actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "waste_actual" REAL /* Waste actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "wind_offshore_actual" REAL /* Wind offshore actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "wind_onshore_actual" REAL /* Wind onshore actual aggregated production in MW */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Exact date and time of the production record */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual entry) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the production record (e.g., active, pending, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_area FOREIGN KEY ("area") REFERENCES areas ("area_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the area is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the area */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area (e.g., urban, rural, mixed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_types" (
  "energy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy type */,
  "energy_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy type (e.g., Biomass, Coal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the energy type (e.g., renewable, fossil, nuclear) */,
  "renewable_type" TEXT /* Type of renewable energy (if applicable, e.g., solar, wind) */,
  "emission_factor" REAL /* Emission factor of the energy type (CO2 emissions per unit of energy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy production record */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., data collection, maintenance) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., system, user) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Additional details about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_logs_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES energy_production ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the record */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES energy_production ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area for which the summary is generated */,
  "total_production_mw" REAL /* Total energy production in MW */,
  "total_fossil_fuel_mw" REAL /* Total fossil fuel production in MW */,
  "total_renewable_mw" REAL /* Total renewable energy production in MW */,
  "period_start" TEXT /* Start of the reporting period */,
  "period_end" TEXT /* End of the reporting period */,
  "total_nuclear_mw" REAL /* Total nuclear energy production in MW */,
  "total_hydro_mw" REAL /* Total hydro energy production in MW */,
  "total_solar_mw" REAL /* Total solar energy production in MW */,
  "total_wind_mw" REAL /* Total wind energy production in MW */,
  "total_other_mw" REAL /* Total other energy production in MW */,
  "total_waste_mw" REAL /* Total waste energy production in MW */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_summary_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model used (e.g., regression, neural network) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Path to the training data used for the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "validation_metrics" TEXT /* Additional validation metrics for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the prediction */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_value_mw" REAL /* Predicted energy production in MW */,
  "actual_value_mw" REAL /* Actual energy production in MW */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "prediction_source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction (e.g., model, manual) */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of reporting period (e.g., daily, monthly, yearly) */,
  "period_description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reporting period (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area for which the trend is observed */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "observed_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was observed */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "trend_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production record associated with the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., system, user) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES energy_production ("production_id")
)
